name: basic_onboarding_flow
expected: {"response": "Great! What is the main goal of your app?"}
stdin: {"user_input": "I want to launch a new app challenge."}
expected_stdout: {"response": "Great! What is the main goal of your app?"}

name: challenge_scope_clarification
expected: {"response": "Can you describe the target audience for your challenge?"}
stdin: {"user_input": "I need help defining the problem statement."}
expected_stdout: {"response": "Can you describe the target audience for your challenge?"}

name: duplicate_conversation_check
expected: {"response": "Let's summarize what we discussed before proceeding."}
stdin: {"previous_conversation": true, "user_input": "I already discussed this with the AI."}
expected_stdout: {"response": "Let's summarize what we discussed before proceeding."}

name: input_validation_special_characters
expected: {"error": "Invalid input. Please provide a valid challenge description."}
expected_stdout: {"error": "Invalid input. Please provide a valid challenge description."}

name: contextual_adaptation
expected: {"response": "What specific healthcare issue are you addressing?"}
stdin: {"user_input": "I want to create a challenge for healthcare innovation."}
expected_stdout: {"response": "What specific healthcare issue are you addressing?"}

name: multi-step_flow
expected: {"response": "Step 1: Define your challenge. What is the main objective?"}
expected_stdout: {"response": "Step 1: Define your challenge. What is the main objective?"}

name: unexpected_input_handling
expected: {"error": "This wizard is for challenge onboarding only."}
expected_stdout: {"error": "This wizard is for challenge onboarding only."}
